NegativeResponseCodes.Code_0x22: Conditions Not Correct or Request Sequence Error
NegativeResponseCodes.Code_0x33: Security Access Denied / Security Access Requested
NegativeResponseCodes.Code_0x43: Can't Download number of Bytes Requested
NegativeResponseCodes.Code_0x53: Can't Upload number of Bytes Requested
NegativeResponseCodes.Code_0x79: Illegal Byte Count During Block Transfer
NegativeResponseCodes.Code_0x80: Service Not Supported In Active Diagnostic Session
